findings.title: XOR-based fake DES encryption
findings.description: Function named des_xor_encrypt implements simple repeating-key XOR instead of real DES encryption

findings.title: Hardcoded encryption key
findings.description: Encryption key hardcoded as plaintext character array in source code

findings.title: std::hash used as cryptographic hash replacement
findings.description: Functions named md5_hash and sha1_hash use non-cryptographic std::hash instead of real algorithms

findings.title: Weak hash used for data integrity signatures
findings.description: Integrity signatures computed using non-cryptographic std::hash with simple concatenation

findings.title: Predictable session token generation via rand()
findings.description: Session tokens generated using rand() seeded with time(nullptr)

findings.title: Predictable API token generation
findings.description: API tokens generated by hashing predictable sequential counter and timestamp values
